proof:agora-compositor.note: Historical optional compositor-capture proof name. It is not part of package.json or verify; keep references clearly marked as deferred until a live compositor harness is restored.

proof:asset-load.note: Older demo-asset slice proof name. Current runnable catalog/asset coverage is through pnpm run evidence -- catalog-workflow-m3 and package scripts.

proof:browser.note: Older Chromium screenshot proof name retained in historical visual-evidence prose. It is not a current package script.

proof:entity-browser.note: Older entity-browser slice proof name retained for feature-history docs; no package script currently exists.

proof:gizmo.note: Older transform-gizmo slice proof name retained for feature-history docs; no package script currently exists.

proof:inspector.note: Older selected-entity inspector slice proof name retained for feature-history docs; no package script currently exists.

proof:v1.note: Older V1 proof aggregator name. Current runnable proof commands are the package scripts in package.json.

proof:visual-capability.note: Older consolidated visual-capability proof name retained in historical visual-evidence prose; no package script currently exists.

proof:visual-contract.note: Older visual-contract proof name retained in historical visual-contract prose; no package script currently exists.

smoke:static.note: Older static smoke command name. Current verification uses check:boundaries, check:docs-scripts, lint, typecheck, test, and build.
